finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_17.md:499; chapters/chapter_17.md:501; chapters/chapter_17.md:503; chapters/chapter_17.md:505; chapters/chapter_17.md:525; chapters/chapter_17.md:553
finding_results.notes: Three targeted edits break the Socratic ladder. (1) Replaced the clean diagnostic 'You're angry at him. Not at the situation. At him. So what did he get wrong.' with Harry's blunt practical attempt: 'So go tell him that. You screwed up, you know you screwed up. Go say so.' Hermione pushes back ('You make that sound simple'), Harry genuinely asks ('Isn't it?'), and Hermione reaches the admission organically ('he's not entirely wrong about me') rather than being walked to it. This gives Harry a messy, oversimplifying intervention and gives Hermione real leverage. (2) Roughened 'He found out before you had it sorted. That's the part.' into 'He found out before you were ready. And that's— I mean, that's the bit, isn't it.' — adding verbal stumble, filler, and colloquial word choice. (3) Replaced the polished antithesis 'And you weren't being thorough. You were being scared.' with the blunter 'That wasn't thorough. That was scared.' — two short declaratives in Harry's natural syntax rather than a balanced rhetorical construction. Harry's core insight still lands but no longer reads as calm coaching.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 17 has been rebuilt around the packet's structural needs: the opening is compressed, the Ministry crisis now shows concrete operational causality and measurable separation costs, the Harry scene turns faster into a changed return condition, the ending advances through decision rather than recap, and the chapter now exceeds the 6000-word minimum.

Single finding addressed via three edits to the Harry confrontation scene (lines 497-557). The Socratic diagnostic ladder is broken by replacing Harry's analytical summary with a blunt practical attempt that Hermione resists, adding a verbal stumble to a mid-scene summary line, and roughening the thesis-delivery line into shorter declaratives. Harry still lands the hard truth but now through friction and blunt directness rather than polished therapeutic precision. Hermione gains genuine leverage in the exchange. No back-to-back diagnostic summaries remain. All other chapter content, heading contract, continuity, and must-land beats preserved.

Addressed the prose tic flagged in the packet by varying sentence architecture across the cited spans and rendering loss through physical detail, action, and scene-specific imagery rather than repeated negative antithesis.
